description: Wear these socks with trainers when you're working out or to keep your feet comfortable when wearing formal shoes.  puma ensure that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Above the ankle length socks in blue and white stripesBranding on the foot regionMade of blended cotton knitRibbed cuffs for a good Fit with a pale blue tipsThree dimensional shaped heel and toe for a good fitSock careMachine wash in warm waterDo not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
